If desired, garnish with fresh strawberries, raspberries,  and blueberries,  Serve immediately.

name: Orange Shake

Add vanilla ice cream and crushed ice.
Blend again.
Pour into a glass.
Take a slice of orange and make a small slit on one side.
Rest it on the rim of the glass and serve with a smile!

name: Easy Banana Milkshake

name: Easiest Banana Shake

name: Chocolate Coffee Frappe

On low speed, use the frappe setting to mix all the ingredients.
After combined, pour into tall, chilled glasses and top with another sprinkle of jimmies.
ENJOY!

name: Orange Creamsicle

First put the amount of vanilla ice cream you would like into the blender or food processor Put the amount of Nesquick you want with the ice cream.
Put the milk in now, and blend until creaminess you would like.

name: Banana Milkshake

Pour in enough milk to cover them.
Add the cinnamon, vanilla and sweetener.
Blend on low for approx.
1 minute or until everything is blended.
The cinnamon and vanilla can be adjusted to your individual taste.
The shake comes out just like a milkshake and is a very tasty alternative to the real thing!

name: Raspberry Cream Shake
directions: Pour milk into blender container.

Blend at high speed 30 seconds or until smooth.

name: Banana-Orange Frosted
directions: Peel and slice the banana,place in a bowl and mash with fork.
Add the orange juice.
Beat with a rotary egg beater until smooth.
Add milk and sherbet.
Beat again until smooth.
ENJOY.

name: Mocha / Jamocha Shake
directions: Combine the coffee, milk, and sugar in a blender and mix on medium speed for 15 seconds to dissolve the sugar.
Add ice cream, and chocolate syrup then blend on high speed until smooth and creamy.
Stop blender and stir mixture with a spoon if necessary to help blend ingredients.
Pour drink into two 16 ounce glasses.

name: Banana Orange Shake
directions: In a blender, blend banana, orange juice, lime juice, yogurt, and sugar until the shake is smooth.
Pour into a chilled cocktail glass and garnish with the orange and lime slices.

name: Cappuccino Breakfast Shake
directions: Put all ingredients in blender.
Mix until coffee is disolved.

name: Rio Breakfast Shake
directions: Blend everything in a blender.

name: Power Breakfast Drink

mix into a smooth paste (NO LUMPS).

add the fresh cream.

serve into 2 glasses and most importantly.

I use whole milk, but skim, rice or soy milk could be substituted.

name: Tropical Fruit Shake

Remove center of blender cover and gradually add cracked ice, blending at high speed.
Add wheat germ and blend 1-2 minutes or until shake is very smooth.

The pudding mix is what makes the shake thick so add as much as you need to make it as thick as you prefer, or not as much if you like less thick shakes.

name: Sinfully Awesome Incredibly Delicious Chocolate Shake
directions: Divide the ice cream: leave a little over half of it frozen and place the rest in a microwave safe bowl.
Melt the ice cream in the bowl in 30 second increments in the microwave.
Every 30 seconds take the bowl out and stir the ice cream, to facilitate melting.
Once melted and smooth, set aside.
Put the Hershey's syrup in the bottom of your blender.
Next, begin adding the frozen ice cream, scoop at a time, until the mixture is too thick to blend.
Now begin adding the melted ice cream, alternating this process until the shake is very thick, but drinkable through a straw.
Add more syrup as necessary to keep the concoction a medium deep chocolate color.
Serve in glasses with straws and wait for the oohs and aahs.

name: Cheesecake Shake
directions: In mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.  Add in the sweet milk and lemon juice; beat until thickened and blended.
Fold in the whipped topping; spoon into crust.
Refrigerate for 2 hours or until set.
Cut into 8 pieces.
For each shake put 1 piece of cheesecake into the blender and add the additional ingredients; cover and process until smooth.  Pour into a chilled glass.

name: Frozen Mocha
directions: Combine cocoa and sugar in a medium saucepan.
Whisk in 3/4 cup water, a little at a time.
Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Simmer for 2 minutes stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and stir in espresso powder and milk.
Strain into shallow baking dish, jelly roll pan is good.
Freeze for several hours until hard.
Break the frozen mixture up with a fork and place chunks in the bowl of a food processor.
Add the remaining 1/4 cup of water and process until no lumps remain and mixture is thick and slushy.
Serve at once.
It is thick like a shake.

name: Chocolate Milkshakes With No Ice Cream!
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and blend on high until there are no chunks of ice left. ** but make sure you're using ONE OR THE OTHER of either cocoa powder OR chocolate milk mix, NOT BOTH.

(My blender makes a grumbling sound and then the sound changes when there are no more ice chunks.)** You can change this recipe so many ways to create your own-- add an 1/8 tsp of peppermint extract for a chocolate mint milkshake.
Add some coffee or 1/2 teaspoon instant espresso powder to make a "Mocha" flavor.
Omit the chocolate and powdered coffee creamer altogether to make vanilla.
With a vanilla base, add any kind of berries-- or replace the milk with 1-1/2 cups orange juice & 1/2 cup water to make the best orange julius just like you get in the mall!

(I don't advise using milk and orange juice together as the acid in the juice will curdle the milk in your stomach!) Play with the amount of sugar, cocoa, etc to create the best taste for you and your family.

name: My Great Grape and Banana Protein Shake

add ALL ingredients including cut up banana into a blender.
mix the ingredients to the texture you would like.

name: Peach Melba Shake
directions: Add the first 5 ingredients into the container of an electric blender.
Process until smooth, occasionally stopping to scrape down the sides of the blender container.
Pour the mixture into glasses.
Add raspberries and 1/2 cup sugar to blender.
Process until smooth; add mixture to the glasses and swirl into the shakes.
Serve immediately.
Note: I usually make the raspberry puree first, set it aside and clean out the blender or use two blenders.
Then I make the peach shakes, pour into glasses and add the raspberry puree; need to move fast so the ice cream won't get too melty.

name: Strawberry Milk Shake

name: Red, White, & Blue Milk Shakes
directions: In a blender, combine the ice cream, milk, and strawberry preserves.
Blend for 1 to 2 minutes, or until well combined.
Pour into 4 glasses and top each with a dollop of whipped topping.
Top with the blueberries and serve immediately.

LIGHTEN IT UP: If you prefer to make a lighter version, simply use nonfat strawberry frozen yogurt in place of the ice cream, and low-fat milk and light whipped topping in place of the traditional varieties.
This can also be made dairy-free by using Tofutti and soy milk in place of the ice cream and milk and leaving out the whipped topping!

name: Orange Julius
directions: Place ingredients into a blender until ice is finely crushed.
More ice will make the drink thicken slightly, as will adding the raw egg.
You can also add 1/2 teaspoon (or slightly more) of almond extract which, I've been told, might get you a little closer to "the real deal". :).

By the way, this definitely isn't a smoothie recipe.  The Orange Julius is much closer to juice in consistency --  not usually "thick" at all. With that said, back when I was a kid, you could ask them to throw in a raw egg and that would thicken the mixture a bit. I've added the egg as an optional ingredient. And I'd definitely add the vanilla extract (and almond for that matter) if you want the "Orange Julius" flavor.

name: Caramelchino Shake

directions: just put it all in the blender.

name: Chocolate Milkshake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend for 20 seconds or until smooth and frothy.

name: Strawberry Milkshake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend for 20 seconds or until smooth and frothy.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Shake
directions: Blend the first three ingredients.
Add peanut butter when blending.
Blend until smooth.

name: Good Morning Shake
directions: Place orange juice and marshmallow creme in blender.
Cover and process until well blended.
Add yogurt and process until smooth.

name: Strawberry Banana Yogurt Shake
directions: Pour milk into blender container.
Add remaining ingredients; cover and blend at high speed for 30 seconds, or until smooth.

name: Strawberry   Milk  Shakes
directions: In a blender add ice cream, strawberries,milk and honey.
Cover and process until smooth.
Pour into glasses.

name: Sunrise Shake (3 Ww Pts)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender, process until smooth.
serving size 1 cup.

similar.name: Drink Till You Drop Breakfast Shake

name: Strawberry Ice Cream Soda
directions: Sweeten crushed strawberries to taste with sugar (I place strawberries with sugar in blender or processor& pulse a couple of times).
Place puree in tall glass; stir in cream and club soda.
Add scoop of vanilla ice cream.
If desired, garnish with fan cut whole strawberry or sprig of fresh mint.
I have used turbinado sugar for a different taste; also can use half& half in place of cream for a thinner, less rich soda.
Other berries would work well.

name: Baskin-robbins Cappuccino Blast (my Version)
directions: Combine the coffee, milk and sugar in a blender.
and mix on medium speed for 15 seconds to dissolve.
sugar.
Add ice cream and ice then blend on high speed.
until smooth and creamy.
Pour drink into two 16-oz.
glasses.
If desired, add whipped cream to the top of each drink followed by a sprinkle of cinnamon.
Makes 2 large drinks.

name: Pineapple, Blueberry, Banana Shake
directions: Put all into a Vita-Mix and blend till smooth and creamy.

similar.name: Fast, Frosty and Fabulous Fruit Shake

name: Vegan Apple Shake
directions: Blend until smooth.

name: Delicious Oreo Malt
directions: Fill a large glass up with vanilla ice cream (4 to 5 big scoops or so).
Add the malted milk, milk, chocolate syrup, and 3 of the Oreos (or one less of whatever amount you decided on).
Mix using a malt machine (or stir on your own) until well mixed, however you like it.
Pour the malt into a large glass and put the last Oreo on top.
(Mine are always very thick, so I eat them with a spoon).

name: Bailey's Milkshake
directions: Crush ice cubes in blender (I use the PULSE button).
Add Baileys Irish cream, ice-cream and milk, process until foamy and well-combined.
Pour into 2 tall glasses, top with a cherry and some mint leaves.
If you like, drizzle chocolate sauce on top and serve immediately.

name: Cool and Creamy Banana Split Shakes
directions: Place the first five ingredients in a blender; cover and process until smooth.
Add ice cream; cover and process until blended.
Pour into chilled glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Ice Cream Cocktail
directions: Using a blender, mix the two ingredients well.
Pour into champagne glasses.
Serve immediately.
This may be frozen and thawed for 20 minutes before serving.

name: Raspberry Milk Shakes
directions: First add the raspberries and milk to an electric blender; process until mixture is smooth.
Add in the ice cream and process until smooth.
Serve in chilled tall glasses.

name: Low-fat Thick and Creamy Chocolate Shake
directions: Pour milk into blender container.
Add pudding mix and frozen yogurt.
Cover and blend on high speed 15 seconds or until smooth.
Serve at once or refrigerate and stir before serving.

name: Mango Shake
directions: Place all ingredients, except mint, in a blender; blend until smooth.
Pour into 2 tall glasses.
Garnish each with a mint leaf.

name: Coffee Milkshake
directions: To make double strength coffee, measure 1 2/3 cups of Starbucks coarsely ground coffee into a 12-cup coffee press.
Add water that has just come to a boil.
Allow to brew 4 minutes, then push plunger down.
Pour into an ice-filled pitcher.
Combine coffee, milk and ice cream in a blender and blend until smooth.
Makes 1 serving.
(Rachael Ray and Paula Deen both add sugar to their shakes, and I've started adding at least one packet of Splenda to mine. Just makes them so much better).

name: Strawberry Cheesecake Shake
directions: In a blender container, combine all ingredients except ice cream; blend well.
Add ice cream; blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Peaches and Cream Milkshake
directions: Place peaches and the 1/4 cup milk in blender container.
Cover and blend till smooth, about 10 seconds.
Spoon in ice cream; cover and blend again till softened.
Add remaining milk; mix till blended.
Sweeten with a little sugar, if desired.
Pour into tall glasses.
Garnish each serving with fresh peach slices.

similar.name: Steak and Shake Style Peach Milkshake

name: Coffee Blast
directions: Combine the strong coffee, milk and sugar in a blender and mix on medium speed for 15 seconds to dissolve sugar.
Add ice cream and ice then blend on high speed until smooth and creamy.
Pour drink into two 16-ounce glasses.
If desired, add whipped cream to the top of each drink followed by a sprinkle of cinnamon.

name: Cappuccino
directions: Blend together.
Serve.

name: Hot Vanilla
directions: In a saucepan, combine the ingredients and warm over low heat.
When small bubbles form around the sides of the pan, remove from heat and let the mixture sit at room temperature for about 15 minutes.
Place the pan back on the stove and rewarm the mixture, whisking it quickly to redistribute the skin that forms on the milk's surface.
Remove the bean half, scrape out the seeds with a sharp knife and put the seeds back in the milk.
Pour the vanilla milk into 2 mugs and top with a sprinkle of cinnamon.
Drink while hot.

name: Strawberry Malted Milk Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender, and process until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Banana Coffee Shake
directions: Process the first three ingredients (ice cream- banana) in a blender until smooth and thick. Add sugar if desired.
Pour into 2 glasses (or 1 large glass) and garnish with shaved chocolate and whipped cream, if desired.

similar.name: Chocolate Banana High Protein Diet Shake

name: Cinnamon Apple Shakes
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients; cover and process until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Frosted Coffee
directions: In blender, combine ice, ice cream, liqueur and instant coffee.
Cover and blend at high speed about 20 seconds or until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses.

name: Strawberry Cereal Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in blender, cover.
Blend n high for 30 seconds till blended.
Pour into large glass and serve.

name: Patrick's Cookies-and-Cream Shake
directions: In a blender, combine ice cream, milk, chocolate chips, and chocolate sandwich cookies.
Blend until frothy.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately with straws.
Garnish with a dollop of whipped cream, if desired.
Variation: Substitute chocolate chip cookies for the chocolate sandwich cookies.

name: Banana Split Shake
directions: In a blender, combine milk, banana, cherries or strawberries and chocolate syrup, blend on high until ingredients are well blended.
Add ice cream in 4 equal increments,blend on high for about 10 seconds or so after each addition, blend until thick and smooth.
Serve with a cherry on top and a tall straw.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Cool and Creamy Banana Split Shakes

name: Marks Awesome Strawberry Milkshake
directions: Put ice, milk and sugar in blender.
Cut ends off strawberries.
Put strawberries in blender.
Blend for 3 to 5 minutes.
ENJOY!

name: Smoothest Vanilla Malt Ever!
directions: Beat egg for 1 minute on high speed, then add sugar and beat for 4 more minutes, or until very light in color.
Add vanilla and flavorings and mix.
Add ice cream and beat on high speed until smooth and all lumps are gone.
ENJOY!
You will not believe how creamy this is!
TIP: This won't work in a blender, as you need to incorporate air into the eggs.
WARNING: Children under 3 should not try this, as it contains raw eggs.

name: Healthy Oats-Bananamilk Shake
directions: In a mixer add all above ingredients and blend till a smooth drink is obtained.
If required add more skimmed milk to adjust the consistency.
Serve chilled.

name: Vanilla Decaf Coffee Shake
directions: Add all ingredients to the blender.
Blend.
Serve and Enjoy!

name: Buttermilk Citrus Shakes
directions: COMBINE sugar and hot water in a small bowl; stir until dissolved.
PUREE all ingrdients in a blender. Be sure to add the ice last so it doesn't lock the blades.
GARNISH each serving with 1 teaspoons crushed cookies, 1/2 teaspoons zest, and a lemon slice. Serve immediately.

name: Your Choice Berry Thick Shake
directions: Put everything in a blender.
Cover and process for a minute.
Pour over ice cubes in a glass and sip away!

name: Coconut Milk Chiller
directions: Place milk, sherbet, pineapple and coconut extract in container of a blender.
Cover; blend until smooth.
Pour into frosted glasses; garnish with pineapple spears, if desired.

similar.name: Fast, Frosty and Fabulous Fruit Shake

name: Grape Juice Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Run blender until smooth.
Enjoy!

similar.name: My Great Grape and Banana Protein Shake

name: Quick Chocolate Milk Shake
directions: Pour milk into blender container.
Add remaining ingredients; cover. Blend at high speed 15 seconds or until smooth. Let stand a few minutes.
Mixture will thicken as it stands. Thin with additional milk, if needed.

similar.name: Low-fat Thick and Creamy Chocolate Shake

name: Jack in the Box Oreo Cookie Shake
directions: Combine the ice cream and milk in a blender and mix on low speed until smooth. Stir the shake with a spoon to mix, if it is necessary.
Crush Oreos while adding to the blender. Mix on low speed for 10 seconds or until cookies are almost pureed. Stir with a spoon if neccesary to help combine the cookies.

similar.name: Jack in the Box Marshmallow Rice Krispie Shake

name: Blueberry Power Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and mix on high until thoroughly blended and mixture is smooth and creamy.
Serve immediately or refrigerate.

name: Banana Pudding Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and enjoy!
Makes 1 serving.

name: Iced Mocha Fusion
directions: Add all ingredients to blender and mix well.
Top with Redi-whip and chocolate syrup if desired.
This makes 1 large or 2 small drinks.
You can easily double this recipe for more servings.

name: Batido De Mango (Mango Shake)
directions: In a blender, combine ingredients.
Blend on high until smooth and frothy.

name: Double Strawberry Banana Shake
directions: Process all ingredients in a blender until smooth, stopping to scrape down sides.

name: Fruit Shake
directions: In a blender, puree the strawberries together with orange juice.
Add the apple juice and orange zest.
Mix and pour into glasses.

name: Strawberry Slurp
directions: Combine strawberries and sugar in container of a 5-cup electric blender.  Add ice to within one inch of container top; blend well.

name: Sonic Strawberry Cheesecake Shake
directions: Combine milk, ice cream, strawberries and cheesecake mix in a blender and mix on high speed until smooth.
Pour into two 12-ounce glasses.
Garnish the top with a squirt of whipped cream from a can and about a teaspoon of graham cracker crumbs from the cheesecake kit.
Serve.

name: Strawberry Yogurt Shake
directions: In a blender, puree the strawberries with yogurt.
Add honey and almond extract, mix well and pour into glasses.

name: Apple Yogurt Shake
directions: Cut apples into quarters.
Remove the seeds and cut into small pieces.
Put all ingredients in a blender and puree.
Pour into glasses and serve chilled.

name: Strawberrian Smoothy
directions: In a blender, combine strawberries, blueberries, banana, and pineapple and blend until smooth.
Add the yogurt and ice cubes and blend until its a nice liquid.
Pour into glasses, and garnish with the halved strawberries.  Sprinkle with sugar if desired.
Enjoy!

name: Banana Shakes
directions: Blend all ingredients.
Pour into chilled glasses.

similar.name: Peanut Butter and Banana Sandwich Shake

name: Caramel Apple Milkshakes
directions: Place the yogurt, milk, cinnamon, and topping in a blender.
Cover and blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Chocolate Milkshakes With No Ice Cream!

name: Iced Mocha Shake
directions: In a blender, combine ingredients (adding sugar to taste or omitting it) and blend until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses.

name: Quick & Creamy Grape-Orange Shake
directions: Puree grapes, banana, and orange in blender or food processor; add honey and ice.
Blend until well mixed.
Garnish with a handful of grapes.

similar.name: Fast, Frosty and Fabulous Fruit Shake

name: Chocolate-Mocha Frosty
directions: Place a two short glass tumblers and glass blender container in the freezer for about 10 to 15 minutes.
Remove blender container from freezer and hook up to blender appliance.
Place the whipped cream/Cool Whip in the blender, along with the Kahlua, chocolate chips and instant coffee.  Cover and blend for about 15 seconds.
Gradually add the ice cream to the blender.  Blend until smooth.
Pour the beverage into the chilled glass tumblers, scraping sides of blender container if necessary.
Garnish with chocolate shavings or sprinkles and serve.

name: Peppermint Shake
directions: Place ice cream, milk, and candy in a blender container.  Blend until smooth and frothy.
Add about 4 ice cubes to blender container.  Process until smooth.
Pour the beverage into cold glasses, scraping the sides of the blender container if necessary.
Garnish with a candy cane or mint sprig or both.

name: Up the Scale Banana Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients except the Vanilla ice cream in blender.
Blend going up the blender scale and back down.
Pour into glasses, add desired scoops of vanilla ice cream and enjoy!

name: Mint-Chocolate Shake
directions: In a blender combine milk, 2 cups ice cream, chocolate syrup, and extract.
Cover and process untill smooth.
Pour into 5 chilled glasses.
Top each with the remaining ice cream.
Sprinkle crushed candy over top.
Enjoy!

name: Berry Milkshakes
directions: In blender, combine first five ingredients; cover and process for 20 seconds or until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses.  Garnish with whipped cream and additional raspberries, if desired.

name: Strawberry Frosted Milk Drink
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Raspberry Frosted Shake
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender and blend.
Enjoy.

name: Mocha Frosted Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend.
Enjoy!

name: Peanut Butter & Banana Protein Shake
directions: Mix the bananas with the milk, then add peanut butter and mix.
Add evaporated milk and honey; mix.
Add eggs and mix.

similar.name: Chocolate Banana High Protein Diet Shake
My Great Grape and Banana Protein Shake

name: Delicious Tropical Shake
directions: Blend together ice cream, light cream, pineapple, frozen orange juice concentrate and banana.
Add ice cubes, one at a time until mixture is thick and foamy.
Sprinkle 1/2 teaspoon of toasted coconut on top of each serving.  Serve immediately.

similar.name: Fast, Frosty and Fabulous Fruit Shake

name: Banana Milkshake
directions: peel banana, and chop into fourths.
mix all ingredients in a blender on low for 15 seconds.
gradually increase the speed.
should mix for about a total of 2 minutes.

name: Ww 4 Points - Caramel Cappuccino Shake
directions: Blend yogurt, milk, espresso powder and cinnamon on high.
Pour into two glasses.
Top each with 2 tablespoons whipped topping and 1 tablespoon caramel topping.

name: Black Forest Protein Shake
directions: Add everything to the blender and mix well.
Nutritional info for protein powder:
One Scoop (33 g): Calories 130, Calories from fat 15, Total Fat 1.5g, Saturated Fat 0g, Cholesterol 0g, Soduim 290g, Total carbs 3 g, Fiber 0g, Sugars 2g, Protein 25g.

name: Maraschino Cherry Shake
directions: Blend cherries, cherry juice and ice cream in a blender or food processor until smooth.
Pour into 4 (12 oz.) glasses.  Top with whipped topping if desired and garnish with whole maraschino cherries.

name: Creamy Pineapple Citrus Shake
directions: Place the crushed pineapple (with juice), orange juice, sugar, lime juice and lemon juice in a blender; blend until smooth.
Add in ice cream; blend again until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses.
Top with a dollup of whipped cream if desired.
Delicious!

name: Banana Coconut Fitness Booster
directions: Combine the first six ingredients in a blender. If you like it more sweet use 2 tablespoons of honey.
Blend thoroughly.
Pour into glass and sprinkle with grated coocnut.
NOTE: You should use a mild honey. You can replace honey by maple syrup. Adjust the sweetness to your taste.
NOTE: If you like the booster cold put it into the fridge for about 1 hour.
Serving tip: spread a very little amount of honey on the edge of the glas and dip it into grated coconut.

name: Protein Shake
directions: In a blender, add all the ingredients so that the liquid covers all and blend until smooth and creamy.

name: Orange Dreamsicle Shake
directions: Put all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth. Enjoy!

name: South Beach Milkshakes
directions: Crush ice cubes in blender.
Add remaining ingredients.
Blend and enjoy!
I accidently added cinnamon instead of cocoa and had a yummy surprise, so experiment!

name: Citrus Shake
directions: 1. Put Orange and Lemon in blender.
2. Pour the juices inches.
3. Blend on chop for 30 seconds.
4. Blend on stir for 30 seconds.

name: Date Shake
directions: Place dates and half the milk in blender. Blend until dates are chopped very fine.
Add the remaining milk and ice cream in blender and mix until smooth.
To serve, pour into tall glasses. Yields 2 servings.

name: Barnamint Baileys
directions: Combine incredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into classes and garnish with crumbled Oreo cookies.

name: Blue Raspberry Fruit Shake
directions: Put blueberries, raspberries, yogurt, sweetener, and 3/4 cup of water in blender.
Blend for a while - you may need to stop your blender and mix things about with a long-handled spoon occasionally.
If fruit shake is too thick, add the other 1/4 cup of water.
Drink immediately for best flavor and texture.
May be kept in the refrigerator for a while but will separate - stir to recombine.

name: Brown Cow Milk Shake
directions: Add all the ingredients to a blender; blend for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or until the mixture is smooth and thick.
For a thinner shake, add 1/2 cup milk.

name: Old-Fashioned Strawberry Malted Shake
directions: Blend ice cream, malt powder and milk until smooth.
Pour into a glass and garnish as desired.

name: Honey Shake
directions: Mix all ingredients in a blender.
Blend on medium speed for 2 minutes .
Pour into glass and enjoy.

name: Cherry Malts
directions: In a blender, combine milk, ice cream, malted milk powder and chocolate; cover and process until blended.
Pour into chilled glasses.

name: Yummy Chocolate Shake
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.

name: Vanilla Frappé Protein Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.

name: Strawberry-Fruit Protein Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.

name: Fruit Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
*You can also add 1 oz of vanilla protein powder for an extra pick me up!

name: Strawberry Whirl
directions: In an blender combine frozen yogurt, strawberries and milk
whirl until almost smooth.
Serve.

name: Frozen Cappuccino Shake
directions: Place 1 scoop frozen yogurt in blender with chocolate milk and coffee.
Whirl until almost smooth.
Pour into glass; top with remaining scoop of yogurt.

name: Sweetheart Shakes
directions: Add 1 1/2 cups milk to a blender; add in vanilla ice cream and 1/3 of the pudding mix.
Cover and blend on high until smooth (about 15 seconds).
Pour mixture into four 8-oz. freezer-safe glasses;freeze for 30 minutes.
Pour remaining ingredients into blender; cover and blend until smooth (about 15 seconds).
Pour into glasses on top of vanilla portion and serve.

name: Pb & Banana Chocolate Malt
directions: In a blender, combine malt powder, ice cream, banana, and peanut butter.
Add milk a little at a time, pulsing after each addition, until you get to a consitency you like.
Pour into a tall glass, add a straw, and enjoy!

name: Copycat Arctic Orange® Shake
directions: Measure the ice cream into blender and allow to thaw about 6-8 minutes.
Add the other ingredients
Mix on high speed until smooth.
Pour into a 12 ounce cup.
ENJOY!

name: Raspberry Yogurt Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor and process until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Valentine Milk Shake
directions: Blend it all until the shake is thick and creamy.
Serve the milk shake in a tall glass ropped with whipped cream serve with some straws.

name: Milton
directions: Prepare espresso.
Scoop ice cream into blender.
Add hazelnut syrup and cinnamon syrup (or ground cinnamon) to blender.
Pour espresso over ice cream.
Blend to milkshake consistency.

name: Ww Core Banana Shake
directions: Put all in a blender, except nutmeg.
Pour into a glass, top with dash of nutmeg.

name: Pineapple Banana Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until smooth or crushed.

name: Mocha Shake
directions: Place water, cocoa, sugar and instant coffee in blender container. Cover; blend briefly on low speed. Add milk.
Cover; blend on high speed until thoroughly blended. Add ice cream. Cover; blend until smooth. Serve immediately.

name: Tropical Shake
directions: Combine juices and yogurt in blender or food processor.
While motor is running, gradually add strawberries and blend until thick and smooth.

name: Oreo Milkshake
directions: Place the ingredients in a blender.
Blend for 20 seconds.

name: Strawberry Float
directions: Put 1 scoop of ice cream in glass first. Fill half the glass with soda. Then add the other scoop of ice cream. Add as much soda to fill the glass (watch out for the froth!).

name: Frappe Mocha
directions: In a small bowl, dissolve coffee granules in water. Pour into ice cube tray; freeze. In a blender, combine the milk, chocolate syrup and ice cubes. Blend until smooth. Add crushed ice; blend. Serve immediately.

name: Ice Cream Coffee Float
directions: POUR coffee into large cup or mug. Top with ice cream. Serve immediately.

name: Creamy Berry Shakes
directions: In a blender, combine the first five ingredients; cover and process for 20 seconds or until smooth. Pour into chilled glasses. Garnish with whipped cream and additional raspberries if desired.

name: Frosty Caramel Cappuccino
directions: In a blender or food processor, combine the half-and-half, milk, 3 tablespoons caramel topping, coffee and ice cubes; cover and process until smooth. Pour into two chilled glasses. Top with whipped cream and drizzle with remaining caramel topping. Serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Banana Shakes
directions: Place milk, ice cream and banana in a blender; cover and process until smooth. Pour into glasses. Garnish with whipped cream and a strawberry if desired.

name: Chocolate Swirl Milkshakes
directions: Combine ice-cream, milk and vanilla in a blender. Process until thick and smooth, about 1 minute.
Divide fudge syrup among parfait glasses, covering the bottom and drizzling syrup in a spiral pattern around inside of each glass.
Pour equal amounts of ice-cream mixture into each glass.
Swirl some chocolate fudge syrup over each serving. Place 1 cherry on top of each milkshake.

name: Banana Performance Shake
directions: Put all in a blender and mix till banana is throughly mixed.

name: Awesome High Protein Shake
directions: Put ingredients into a blender or smoothie mixer.
Mix until smooth.
Pour into cup.

name: M&m's Brain Freezer Shake
directions: In blender container combine ice cream and milk; blend until smooth. Add 1/2 cup M&M's Chocolate mini baking bits; blend just until mixed. Pour into 2 glasses.
Top each glass with whipped topping. Serve immediately.

name: Avocado - Banana Shake
directions: Halve the avocado, remove the pit, and squeeze each half into the blender (faster than scooping it out!).
Add banana, yogurt, and 1 cup of soy milk.
Blend on medium or high.
If it is too thick (it probably will be) you can add water or ice, or more soy milk if you'd prefer a slightly sweeter drink.
Drink within 1/2 hour of blending, or the shake will discolor slightly (flavor will remain the same, it just looks less good.).

name: Mocha Summertime Delight
directions: Combine coffee and cold water in blender.  Add ice cream, rum (or almond extract) and salt.  Blend for 30-60 seconds.
Pour into 8 ounce glasses with a dab of whipped cream and a sprinkling of nutmeg or grated chocolate.
Serve immediately.

name: Peanut-Butter-Cup Shake
directions: Chop peanut butter cups. In blender, combine ice cream, milk, and peanut butter and blend until mixture is smooth. Add candies and blend until combined. Pour into two tall glasses.

similar.name: Peanut Butter and Banana Sandwich Shake

name: Peanut Butter & Jelly Shakes
directions: Place ice cream, milk and peanut butter in blender. Blend at medium speed 1 to 2 minutes or until smooth and well blended. Add chopped cookies; blend 10 seconds at low speed. Pour into 2 serving glasses.
Place preserves and 1 to 2 teaspoons water in small bowl; stir until smooth. Stir 2 tablespoons preserve mixture into each glass. Serve immediately.

name: Cinnamon Vanilla Milk Shake
directions: Place the milk, frozen yogurt, vanilla extract, and cinnamon in a blender, and process on medium speed until thick and creamy.
Scrape the sides of the blender during processing as needed.
Divide the shake among 2 tall chilled glasses.
Top each with a tablespoon of the whipped topping and, if desired, a sprinkling of nutmeg.
Enjoy!

name: Easy Pudding Milk Shake
directions: Toss all ingredients into blender.
Blend on high speed for about 30 seconds or until smooth.
Garnish as desired and serve immediately.

name: My Guilt Free Chocolate Shake
directions: Dissolve the baking cocoa as best you can in the water and pour into blender.
Add the ice cubes and sweetener and blend for about 5 minutes.
The sweetener is to your personal preference. You may want to add a few packs and then taste.

name: Pineapple Banana Shakes
directions: In a food processor or blender, combine all ingredients; cover and process until smooth. Pour into glasses; serve immediately.

name: Choco Junkie Milkshake
directions: place oreo cookies, nesquik, ice cream, and milk in a blendor.
blend until smooth.
garnish with whipped cream and chocolate syrup.

name: Chocolate Mint Frosty
ingredients: Jell-O chocolate pudding and pie filling
directions: POUR milk into large glass measuring cup. Add enough ice to measure 3 cups. Pour into blender. Add remaining ingredients; cover.
BLEND on high speed until smooth.
POUR into glasses. Serve immediately.

name: Banana Chocolate Shake --Mommy Energy Drink--
directions: Split banana in half, put both pieces in blender. No need to freeze, this shake comes out a very good consistency.
Then add milk follwed by ice cream.
Add the Nesquik then blend on high for about a minute and its ready to drink. No need for ice cubes unless you want it thicker, but like I said it comes out thick.
I have 2 kids and when I don't have time to cook a meal for myself, I drink this and I feel energized till my next meal. And if you use low fat ice cream and low fat milk its more healthy.

name: Buttermilk-Pineapple Shake
directions: In a blender, place the buttermilk in firstly, then all remaining ingredients; blend until smooth (add in more sugar to taste if desired).

name: Frozen Mocha Almond Shake
directions: Combine all of the ingredients except for the frozen yogurt in blender; blend until well combined.
Add the frozen yogurt; blend until just combined.  Serve at once.
Makes 2 servings.

name: Classic Coke Float
directions: Scoop the vanilla ice cream into a tall glass filling about half full.
Top with cola soda.
Gently stir in the vanilla.
Top with a maraschino cherry.
Serve immediately.

name: Banana-Mocha Shake
directions: Process all ingredients in a blender 1 minute or until smooth, stopping to scrape down sides.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Cool and Creamy Banana Split Shakes

name: Cool Waters Shakes
directions: In a blender, combine 2 cups of milk, one package of gelatin and 2 cups of ice cream. Cover and process for 30 seconds or until smooth. Repeat. Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

name: The Berry Patch Shake
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients. Blend thoroughly and pour into two tumblers.  Sprinkle with fresh berries.

name: Healthy Strawberry Milkshake
directions: Place all ingredients in the blender. Process until smooth anad frothy.
Pour into a tall glass, and drink immediately. Enjoy!

name: Peppermint Vanilla Milkshake
directions: Blend icecream, milk, and extracts into blender.
As soon as it turns into one liquid, stop blending.
Optional: Garnish with either crushed candycane, mint leaves, or vanilla bean.

name: Russian Mango Shake
directions: Peel and cut mango into chunks. Combine all ingredients together in blender and mix until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve.

name: Deluxe Banana Milkshake
directions: Put the bananas in a blender.
Add the milk, sugar, vanilla extract, and ice cubes.
Blend on medium 1 minute.
Add the cinnamon and serve.
Enjoy!

name: Orange-Banana Tropical Drink
directions: Mix all ingredients at high speed for thirty seconds.
Chill and serve.

name: Banana-Caramel Milkshake
directions: To make Caramel Sauce:
Bring cream to just under a boil over medium heat in a medium saucepan.

Combine sugar, lemon juice, and 3 tablespoons water into a separate saucepan. (Be sure to use a heavy pan, such as a saucier) Place over medium heat, and, without stirring, bring to a simmer. (If sugar crystals form, dissolve with a wet pastry brush) Continue to cook while swirling the pan around until it becomes a deep caramel color, about 6 to 8 minutes (depending on the weight of the saucepan) let the color be your guide.
Slowly add hot cream, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon. (Caution, mixture will spatter.).
Cook 1 minute to dissolve caramel. Remove from heat.
Stir in vanilla, kosher salt, and rum (if desired).
Let cool. Store refrigerated in an airtight container up to 5 days; bring to room temperature before using.
To make milkshake:
Process 1/2 cup caramel sauce and all ingredients in a blender until smooth. Serve in individual glasses, and top with additional caramel sauce, if desired.

name: Delicious Double Strawberry Shake
directions: Place the milk, ice cubes, berries and sugar in a blender: blend until smooth.

name: Strawberry Milk Shake
directions: To make the strawberry syrup: Bring syrup ingredients (strawberries - salt) to a boil in a saucepan over medium high heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Boil uncovered 10 minutes on low, stirring occasionally. Add the lemon juice. Strain, pressing down on the solids.
Cover and chill for at least one hour or up to one week.
Place 2 (12 - ounce) glasses in the freezer for one hour. (The original recipe made 4 glasses but used 2 pints of ice cream).

To make the milk shakes: place 1 cup strawberry syrup, 1 cup milk, and 1 cup ice cream in a blender and puree until smooth. (For four glasses just use 1 pint of ice cream.) Add second cup of ice cream (or for 4 glasses use 2 cups of ice cream) and puree until almost smooth.
Pour into frozen glasses. Drizzle with additional strawberry syrup if desired and garnish with strawberries if desired.

Then put ice cream,stewed rhubarb and splash of milk in blender,blend until smooth and combined.
Pour into tall glasses and enjoy!

Pour 1 Tablespoon of chocolate syrup into the bottom of each glass. (This makes the drink look and taste even more delectable.)

For adults an added Tbls or two of Godiva Liqueur, Amaretto, or Kaluha would be tasty.

name: Mocha Milkshake
directions: The points really vary, depending upon whether you use fat free dairy products, especially with the ricotta cheese. You can vary the amount of ricotta to suit how many points you want to spend that morning. I like to have a creamier shake (but not thick and icy) and I don't always get in my calcium during the day, so I usually have 1/2 cup of ricotta.
The cocoa, splenda and coffee are all 0 points, so you get a lot of delicious flavour, without the guilt.

I have also had variations where I replaced the coffee with peanut butter, for a chocolate peanut butter cup kind of taste; or it's still really yummy even if you run out of cocoa (tastes like a latte shake).
It's also a good recipe for those with a sweet tooth that need to avoid sharp blood sugar fluctuations, as the only sugar is in the dairy products.
