directions: Pour 1/4 C cranberry juice in each of 6 short, wide glasses.
Place 1/2 C sherbert in each glass.
Fill with ginger ale.

name: Lemon Shake (Non-Alcoholic Beverage)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender & cover.
Blend till smooth & serve immediately.

similar.name: Summertime Lemonade or Limeade Milk Shake

name: Healthy Raspberry Chocolate Shake
directions: Just throw everything in the blender and blend on full speed. Becomes a delicious rich, milkshake-like shake,.

name: Dairy-Free Strawberry Milkshakes
directions: Place the banana, strawberries, Ice Dream, soy drink and honey into a blender and blend until smooth.
Spoon 1-2 tbs of strawberry topping into each of 2 tall glasses. Tilt the glasses to swirl and coat the inside. Pour the strawberry shake into the glass. Serve immediately.
Notes & tips.
Vanilla Supreme Ice Dream is a frozen, low-fat, non-dairy soy dessert.
Variation - butterscotch milkshakes: Omit the strawberries and add 2 tsp of wheat germ. Use butterscotch-flavoured topping in place of strawberry topping.

name: Milkshake Kaboom
directions: put ice and milk in blender and blend for 30-45 seconds.
add in banana and blend for 10-15 seconds or until mostly smooth banana (ice chunks wanted).
add in ice cream of choice and Kahluha or Bailey's.
Blend til texture is your style ( I like mine thicker and chunky).
pour into large glass.
drizzle with chocolate  or carmel syrup.
add whipped cream.
ENJOY!

name: Oreo Milkshake
directions: Coarsely chop 14 cookies.
Blend chopped cookies, 1 pint ice cream, milk and chocolate syrup in electric blender until well blended and smooth.
Pour into 4 (8-ounce) glasses; top each with a scoop of remaining ice cream and a cookie.
Serve immediately.

name: Peanut Butterscotch Protein Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and mix well.

similar.name: Butterscotch Pecan Liquid Pie Protein Shake

name: Chocolate Frappe
directions: In a tall glass empty the cocoa packet into the bottom and top with nonfat milk. Using the drink blender attachment of your stick blender (or do this in just a regular blender) whip the two ingredients together until the milk is frothy.
Add in the chocolate sauce and continue to whip with the blender until the drink is nearly doubled in volume.
Enjoy.

name: Creamsicle Milkshake
directions: In blender process sherbert, ice cream and milk until smooth.

Seperately, combine 1/2 c whipped topping and orange food coloring. Place orange topping and the other 1/2 c whipped topping (to produce a swirled effect of the topping)in pastry bag fitted with large star tip. Pipe into milkshakes.
If desired, garnish with orange decorating sugar and orange jelly candy.

name: Tropical Shake
directions: Toss pineapple and banana well, cover and freeze 1 hour.
Process the frozen fruit and remaining ingredients in blender until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Tropical Shake
directions: mix in a shake mixer until smooth and drink.

name: Boysenberry Milkshake
directions: Combine ingredients in a blender set on high speed and blend until smooth.

name: Weight  Watcher Triple Thick Milkshake
directions: Combine everything in a blender and mix until smooth.

name: Vietnamese Sinhto (Fruit Shake)
directions: Boil the fructose and water for about 4 min to get fructose syrup.
Blend all the ingredients, except for the ice and coconut milk, until smooth, then pass the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve.
To serve, pour the drink into chilled tall glasses, add the ice cubes and top with coconut milk.
This beverage is also usually served with a shot glass of iced water to remove any aftertaste.

name: Strawberry Shake for Diabetics
directions: In a blender, combine the frozen yogurt, crushed ice,and milk, turning the machine off and on several times until blended, about 1 minute.
Add the strawberries and vanilla.
Blend for another 30 seconds, until strawberries are finely chopped.
Pour into a tall glass and serve.

name: Tropical Milk Shakes
directions: Blend 1 1/4 cups ice cream, 1 cup plus 2 tablespoons milk, 5 tablespoons coconut milk, 1/4 of the pineapple, 1/4 of the bananas, 1/4 of the papayas and 8 strawberries in the blender until smooth.
Pour into a large pitcher.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients in 3 more batches. Serve immediately.

name: Banana Mocha Cooler
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients. Cover and process for 45-60 seconds or until frothy.
Pour into glasses; serve immediately.

similar.name: Cool and Creamy Banana Split Shakes

name: Peanut Butter Power Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into 2 serving glasses and serve.

name: Blueberry Pie Shake
directions: Combine pie filling, frozen yogurt, milk & lemon juice & blend well with electric mixer or in a blender.
Pour into 4 tall chilled glasses & drink up!

name: Banana Milkshake
directions: put all in blender and mix for 1 minute.

name: Now That's a Milkshake!
directions: Into the blender pour the following ingredients; coconut milk, yogurt, orange juice and ice cream,  processing until smooth.
Next add the peach slices, the nectarine slices and the ice cubes and process until smooth.
Pour the mixture into chilled glasses and garnish with the nectarine slices.

name: Amaretto Mocha Protein Drink
directions: Put ingredients in blender, in the order listed. Blend until smooth and creamy. Enjoy!

name: Low Gl Iced Coffee Frappé
directions: Combine the instant coffee, sugar, ice cubes, and water in a cocktail shaker or wide-mouth jar with tight fitting lid. Secure lid and shake vigorously until frothy, about 30 seconds. Pour into a tall glass, add the soy milk and stir to mix. Sprinkle the cinnamon and serve with a straw.

name: Moo Milkshakes
directions: Blend ice creams and cookies in a blender on high for 10-20 seconds while adding milk slowly.
Top with a swirl of whipped cream and a drizzle of chocolate syrup.

name: Simple Mocha Frappe
directions: Note: To make frozen coffee cubes, brew a strong cup of coffee (I use instant since nobody else drinks it) and add sugar or splenda to taste.  Then freeze in ice cube tray.
Blend coffee cubes and milk in blender until large chunks are gone.
Add ice cream and blend til combined and still fairly thick.
Enjoy!

name: Cinnamon Coffee Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in an electric blender.  Blend for approximately 30 seconds.
Pour into a tall glass.
Enjoy!

name: Banana Strawberry Shake
directions: Blend all together in a blender until smooth.

name: Banana Milk Shake
directions: Blend till smooth.
Top with whipped cream and a piece of banana.

name: Caramel Banana Milkshake
directions: Place milk, banana, ice cream and sundae sauce in blender. Cover and blend at high speed until smooth.

name: Hot Hot Chocolate
directions: Melt 1 bar of chocolate with 2 tsp of milk on a double boiler. Keep stirring till it becomes saucy.
Add milk and serve with chocolate sprinkles or marshmallows.

name: Fast Food Milkshake - Healthied Up!
directions: Chop half a banana into slices, place in plastic baggy and freeze overnight. (Do the same with the other half and save for future shake. Trust me, there will be a future shake).
Gather ingredients.
Place half banana (now chopped and frozen) into blender. Add 1/3 cup ice,  milk and 1 teaspoon of vanilla extract. Blend until smooth.
(Optional: Add 1 packet of Splenda for extra sweetness).
Pour mix into tall glass. Sprinkle about 1 teaspoon of ground cinnamon on shake.
Drink it. Be in HEAVEN!

name: Mouthwatering Maple Malt
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Blend or puree until your ice cream is chopped and blended into a thick but not chunky consistency.  (About 2-3 minutes).
Pour into glasses.  Serve and enjoy!
For a lighter version, use fat free ice cream or frozen yogurt, and skim milk.

name: Simple Vanilla Milkshake
directions: Blend ice cream, milk, and ice in a blender until smooth.
Optionally serve with whipped cream.

name: Chocolate Milkshake
directions: Put all the milkshake ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
For the chocolate swirl melt the chocolate chips in a microwave safe container stirring after every minute until smooth.
Stir the milk into the melted chocolate and microwave for about another 30 seconds and then stir again until smooth.

To decorate the serving glass, place a tablespoon of the chocolate swirl sauce on the inside rim of a tall glass and then allow it to move down the inside of the glass, spinning the glass to create a swirl effect. Repeat with remaining sauce for both glasses.
Pour the milkshake into the glasses and place a scoop of ice cream on top of each one. ENJOY!

name: Frozen Gingerbread Cappuccino
directions: Pour ingredients into a blender cup.
Blend for 30 seconds or until smooth and creamy.
Top with whipped cream and garnish with a gingerbread man cookie.

name: Pineapple Shakes
directions: In blender, combine all ingredients; cover and process until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Ice Cream Soda
directions: Blend 1 1/2 cups frozen yogurt and strawberries in a blender. Divide between 2 tall glasses and add 1 cup chilled club soda to each glass. Top each with 1/4 cup nonfat vanilla frozen yogurt.

name: Protein Shake
directions: throw everything into a blender and mix.
serve immediately.

name: Chocolate Milkshake With Ice Cream
directions: Mix milk, chocolate powder, sugar, cocoa powder in a blender. process until it becomes smooth.
Divide mixture among glasses.cover bottom and drizzling syrup in a spiral pattern inside of each glass.
Pour equal amount of ice cream mixture into each glass.
Swirl some chocolate syrup over each serving and serve cold.

name: Hot Chocolate Shake
directions: Blend milk, chocolate powder, sugar. pour equal amount in each glass.
Add ice cream on the top n swirl some hot chocolate syrup over each serving and serve hot.

name: Butterfinger Milkshakes
directions: Combine ingredients in blender and blend until the milkshakes reach the consistency you like.

name: Ron's Irish Cream Milkshake
directions: Place ingredients into blender.
Mix until blended. Enjoy!

name: O.j. Yogurt Shake
directions: Blend all ingredients except ice until smooth and frothy.
Add ice and process until smooth and frothy.

name: Banana Milkshake
directions: Cut up banana and put in blender.
Put in the rest of ingredients.
Gradually blend going slower to higher speeds.

name: Sherbet Shake
directions: Mix 1/2 quart of sherbet & 1/4 liter of soda together in a blender. Repeat with the other half of the ingredients.
Serve chilled in a glass.

name: Raspberry Milkshake
directions: Put everything in blender and blend on high speed until smooth.

name: Raspberry-Banana Milkshake
directions: Everything into blender.
Blend on high until smooth.

name: Butterfinger Freeze (Milkshake)
directions: Spoon 1/4 of the ice cream into food processor and add 1 candy bar;blend slightly.
Repeat until all ice cream and candy bars are used.
If ice cream is too thick add small amount of milk.
Freeze should be very thick.
Spoon into 8 glasses and serve.

name: Low Carb Milkshake
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender.
Serve immediately.

name: Kittencal's Creamy Chocolate Milkshake
directions: Place the ice cream into the blender.
Pour in 1/2 cup milk (add in more milk for a thinner consistency).
Pour in the chocolate syrup; blend until smooth.
Pour into a large tall glass (use a chilled glass if possible).
Top with canned whipped cream (use as much as desired).
Insert a long thick straw and enjoy!

name: Chocolate Fudge Butter Cream Slush
directions: Melt butter in a small pot.
Pour in milk little by little, whisking thoroughly.
Whisk in cocoa powder and sugar.Whisk until a bit thick.
Pour mixture into a cup and let it cool before freezing it.
This should result in a not-so-hard fudge that will melt if you take it out of the freezer, but still thick and runny.
The fudge can be cut into squares and eaten just like that or in this case, you let it melt first and then blend it with the vanilla ice cream until smooth and creamy.
If it is too creamy or thick, add in a lil' water or blend it with some ice cubes.
Great for summer.

name: Chocolate Cherry Shake
directions: Drain cherries.
Combine all ingredients in a blender. Cover and blend until smooth.
Pour into 2 small glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Milkshake
directions: place all ingredients in a blend and wizz for 40 seconds!

name: Chocolate-Peanut Butter Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender. Cover and blend until smooth.
Pour into 2 small glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Caribbean Fruit Shake (Lactose Free)
directions: Peel the banana and cut into a few pieces. Place the bananas to a blender. Add the pineapple and orange juices. Put a lid on the blender and blend for about 20 seconds and smooth.
Add the ice and blend for about 30 seconds and smooth and frothy.
Pour into serving glasses and enjoy!

name: Vodka Orange Milkshake
directions: Puree all ingredients in a blender until smooth.
Divide between two tall glasses and serve.

similar.name: Easy Peasy Cold Buttered Rum Milkshake

name: Nutella Shake
directions: Add everything into a blender, and mix it all up.

name: Tropical Fruit Shake
directions: Using a sharp knife, cut away the skin from the pienapple and halve the fruit.
Discard the core and roughly chop the flesh of one half. Add to a blender or food processor with the grapes.
Halve the mango, scoop out the flat stone (pit) and sccop the flesh into the blender.
Process thoroughly until really smooth, scraping the mixture down from the side of the bowl, if necessary.
Pour into glassses and top up with lemonade or mineral water, if using. Serve immediately.

name: Yogurt Shake
directions: Blend the yogurt with milk,yogurt,sugar ,honey and cream.
Top with mint leaves.

similar.name: High Protein Chocolate Peanut Butter Shake

name: Springtime Strawberry Malts
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Cover and process until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses and serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Breakfast Shakes
directions: In blender, combine the first five ingredients; cover and process mixture until smooth and thickened.
Pour into chilled glasses and garnish with whole strawberries.
Serve immediately.

name: Chocolate Covered Cherry Shake (Sugar-Free)
directions: Place cherries, milk, vanilla and Splenda into a blender and puree.
Add ice cream and club soda to the puree and blend on low until desired consistency is reached.
Drizzle chocolate syrup around the inside of one large or two medium glasses.
Pour shake into glass.
Drizzle more chocolate syrup over the top of the shake.
Top with Cool Whip Lite or whipped cream.

name: Peanut Butter, Banana and Baileys Cheesecake Milk Shake
directions: Put all the ingredients into a blender and blitz until it is the texture you like for your milkshakes. It took me about 30 - 45 seconds to get everything combined to create a thick shake.
Pour into glasses and enjoy.

name: Chocolate Banana Strawberry Milk Shake
directions: Combine everything but whipped cream in the blender. Blend until smooth.
top with whipped cream and serve.

name: Mocha Frappuccino Shake
directions: Pour coffee into an ice cube tray and freeze about 6-7 coffee ice cubes.
Stir Splenda into milk until dissolved, then combine all ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into two chilled glasses and top with whipped cream then a drizzle of chocolate syrup - Yummy!

name: Lemon Drop Shakes
directions: Rub rim of 6 juice-size glasses with one lemon slice. In a shallow dish combine combine crushed lemon drops and sugar; dip glass rims in mixture; set aside.
In a blender combine ice cream and lemonade. Cover and blend until smooth. Pour ice cream mixture into glasses. Top with remaining lemon slices.

name: Orange Yoghurt Shake
directions: COMBINE ingredients in a cocktail shaker. Serve.

name: Instant Coffee Cooler
directions: Blend well and serve.

name: Lemon Cheesecake Thick Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender. Cover and pulse until mixture starts to swirl.
Blend on high for 20 seconds, or until the drink is smooth.

similar.name: Summertime Lemonade or Limeade Milk Shake

name: Banana Blueberry Protein Shake
directions: Add ingredients to a blender in the order listed (helps with blending) and mix on high until creamy smooth.
Add more milk if needed - but only a little at a time!
(For a lower fat version, substitute vanilla frozen yogurt for the ice cream and use skim milk.  Still yummy!).

name: Chocolate Malted Milk Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender or milk-shake machine.
Blend at medium speed for 2 minutes and pour into a tall glass.

similar.name: Low-fat Thick and Creamy Chocolate Shake

name: Vanilla Mocha Iced Coffee
directions: Blend everything together on low in your blender except for the ice.
Then pour over ice and enjoy! :).

name: Strawberry Cheesecake Protein Shake
directions: Mix together.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Pumpkin Pie Protein Shake
directions: Blend together.
Enjoy!

name: Orange Creamsicle
directions: combine all ingredients into a blender.
blend until smooth.

similar.name: Chocolate Milkshakes With No Ice Cream!

name: Orange Julius Protein Shake
directions: put ingredients in blender, blend until smooth.
Enjoy.

name: Peanut Brittle Protein Shake
directions: Add all ingredients to blender, whip, and serve.
I like to use chunky peanut peanut butter and add it last so that it it stays chunky (like peanut brittle) but it tastes just as good with a smoother consistency.

similar.name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Death Protein Shake

name: Cinnamon Roll Protein Shake
directions: Add all ingredients to blender, whip, and serve.
Enjoy.

name: Cherry Vanilla Protein Shake
directions: Put all of it in a blender and hit liquify!
Enjoy!

name: Oreo Milk Shake
directions: Chop or coarsely break cookies.
Place milk, ice cream and chocolate syrup in blender container.
Add chopped cookies and blend on high speed until smooth.
Pour into 4 glasses and serve immediately.

similar.name: Jack in the Box Oreo Cookie Shake

name: Butterscotch Pecan Liquid Pie Protein Shake
directions: Blend protein powder, water and pudding mix. (The pudding mix thickens the liquid considerably).
Add ice cubes and blend till ice slivers.
Add pecans and blend again for a few seconds.
Pour into nice huge parfait glass and enjoy.

name: Orange Creamsicle Protein Shake
directions: Blend on high for 2 minutes.
Enjoy!

name: Wendy's Frosty Vanilla Peanut Butter Fruity  Protein Shake
directions: Blend before adding peanut butter, then add the peanut butter and blend again till ice slivers. Note: (if you put in too many ice cubes, it will dilute the peanutty taste).

similar.name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Death Protein Shake

name: Vanilla Butterscotch Protein Shake
directions: Blend it all, and let it set up a little, and it tastes all custardy.
Enjoy.

similar.name: Wendy's Frosty Vanilla Peanut Butter Fruity  Protein Shake

name: Double Chocolate Fudge Protein Shake
directions: Mix in blender.
Enjoy.

name: Chocolate Fudge Protein Shake
ingredients: sugar-free instant chocolate fudge pudding mix
directions: Blend ProScore, pudding and water, add ice cubes, blend till crushed with ice slivers still un-melted.
Pour into insulated cup (makes about 16 oz) And eat it with a tiny silver spoon (optional).

name: Turtle Shake Protein Shake
directions: Blend on high for 2 minutes.
Enjoy.

name: Nutty Buddy
directions: Blend ice first until slightly crushed.
Add the rest of the ingredients and blend until smooth.
Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate shvings if desired.

name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Death Protein Shake
directions: Mix until entirely smooth. Pour.
Sit back and enjoy pure indulgence.

similar.name: Wendy's Frosty Vanilla Peanut Butter Fruity  Protein Shake

name: Chocolate-Peanut Butter Milkshakes (Aka Peanutty Freeze)
directions: Place water, peanut butter, dry hot cocoa mix, and ice cream in a blender container.  Cover; blend until smooth, about 30 seconds.
Pour mixture into two tall beverage glasses.
Garnish with whipped cream or chocolate whipped cream, if desired, and sprinkle the top with the finely chopped peanuts.

similar.name: Peanut Butter and Banana Chocolate Milkshake

name: Chocolate Blueberry Soy Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in blender, blending at high speed until well-blended, about 30 seconds.
Pour into chilled glass & enjoy!

name: Dirty Banana
directions: Blend together all ingredients for 30 seconds.
Use coconut rum or vodka for variation.

name: Pumpkin Protein Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in a small blender.
Process until slushy.

name: Mint Chocolate Shake
directions: Steep mint tea in hot water for 5 minutes, Squeeze remaining from tea bag and discard.
Add ice to tea. Combine all ingredients in blender. Blend on high until mixture is smooth and creamy.
Transfer to a tall glass and serve.

name: Raw Vanilla Milk Shake
directions: Blend all ingredients until creamy and smooth, adding enough almond milk (or water) for your preferred consistency.
It's easy to make variations of this recipe.
Chocolate Milkshake - add 3 tsp of carob or cacao powder to the vanilla milkshake.
Strawberry - Add 1 cup of Strawberries or other berry.
Extra Creamy - add 1 cup of cashews.

similar.name: The Most Beast Banana Milkshake Recipe Ever

name: German Chocolate Cake Protein Shake
directions: Shake all ingredients in a cocktail shaker.

name: Bananas over You
directions: Mix all ingredients in blender.

name: Chocolate Covered Cherries Protein Shake
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.
Tip: You can use frozen cherries if you can't find fresh.

name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Shake
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.
Variation: If you'd like to try something a little different, look for other nut butters, such as almond butter or cashew butter. You can find these at most health food stores.

similar.name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Death Protein Shake

name: Basic Protein Shake
directions: Measure the milk and protein powder into the blender. Add the ice cubes along with the flavoring ingredients you have chosen and quickly pulse the blender on and off until the shake is well blended, creamy, and frosty. Do not add more liquid; the ice will liquefy to produce a smooth consistency.
Incredible Shake Variations To Add To The Basic Shake Formula:
Vermont Banana:1 banana chunk, 1 tsp maple extract.
Cookies And Cream:2 sugar free chocolate cream filled sandwich cookies.
1 heaping tbl cool whip,1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Elvis's Favorite:1 banana chunk,1 heaping tbl whipped peanut butter,.
1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Creamy Banana:1 banana chunk,1/4 tsp cinnamon,1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Banana Nog:1 banana chunk,1/8 tsp freshly grated nutmeg,.
1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Orange Banana Frosted:Replace milk in basic shake with 1/4 c water,.
1 banana chunk,1/4 c orange juice,1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Chocolate Covered Banana:1 banana chunk,2 tsp cocoa powder,.
1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Banana Bread:1 banana chunk,2 tbl sugar free hazelnut syrup.
Mochaccino:1/2 tsp instant espresso,2 tsp cocoa powder,1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Grande Sugar Free Hazelnut Latte:1 tsp instant espresso,2 tbl sugar free hazelnut syrup, pinch cinnamon.
Cafe Mexico:1 tsp instant espresso,1/4 tsp cinnamon.
Mexican Chocolate:2 tsp cocoa powder,1/2 tsp vanilla extract,.
1/4 tsp cinnamon.
Apple Crisp:1/4 c no sugar added applesauce,1/2 tsp cinnamon,.
1 tbl sugar free hazelnut syrup.
Peanut Butter Cup:2 tsp cocoa powder,1 heaping tbl whipped peanut butter,.
1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Chocolate Cherry:2 tsp cocoa powder,1/4 c frozen cherries,1/2 c almond extract.
Coconut Patty:2 tsp cocoa powder,1 tsp coconut extract,1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Tropical Dream:2 papaya cubes,1 banana chunk,1 tsp coconut extract,.
1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Pina Colada:2 pineapple cubes,1/2 tsp coconut extract,1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Cancun Sunset:1 pineapple cube,3 frozen strawberries,1/2 tsp vanilla extract.
Cherry Pie:1/4 c frozen cherries,1/2 tsp almond extract,1/2 tsp vanilla extract.

similar.name: Snickers Bar Protein Shake Low Carb

name: Orange Creamsicle Protein Shake
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender (in the order listed) and blend until smooth.

Tip: Other varieties of oranges will not mix well in the blender and will cause the shake to become stringy and undrinkable. If you want to substitute orange juice for the mandarin oranges, you can do so, but keep in mind that the recipe won't contain the needed fiber.

name: Vanilla Cappuccino Protein Shake
directions: Place all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.
Variation: Instead of vanilla extract, you can use almond extract for a nutty flavor. To make a mocha cappuccino, use chocolate unjury protein powder.

name: Heart Healthy Strawberry Banana Shake
directions: In a blender add 4 Ice cubes and crush using fastest speed available (if you do not have a blender capable of crushing Ice, place cubes in a plastic bag and pre crush with a meat mallet or bottom of a pan first).
Add remaining ingredients.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into 12 oz glass.
Garnish with Fresh or Thawed Frozen Strawberries (optional).

name: Strawberry Cheesecake Protein Shake
directions: Blend all ingredients in blender for 45 seconds.
Enjoy!

name: Protein Frappuccino
directions: Place all ingredients in blender (we have a small one serving blender that works great).  Once all the ice is blended, enjoy!

name: Cherry-Vanilla Milkshake With Root Beer
directions: Pour root beer into a baking pan and freeze uncovered, until firm, about 2 1/2 hours.  Using a fork, scrape into small shards.  Cover, and freeze until ready to use.
Purée ice cream and reserved cherry juice in a blender until smooth.  Add cherries, and pulse until combined, but still chunky.  Divide among 6-8 glasses, and top each with root beer granita.

name: Mc Donald's Shakes
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.

name: Cherry-Cranberry Shake
directions: In a blender, process all ingredients until smooth.
Serve immediately & enjoy!

name: Chocolate Coffee Milkshake
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Enjoy.

name: Snickers Bar Protein Shake Low Carb
directions: Pour water, cream, syrups & protein powder into blender container, blend on low until well combined.
Add the coffee ice cubes, one at a time until shake is thick & creamy.

name: Root Beer Floats That Aren't for the Kids
directions: In a pint glass, stir together 1/4 cup of the root beer and the root beer schnapps. Place in the freezer for 2 hours, or until ready to drink. Leave the remaining root beer at room temperature.
When ready to drink, scoop the ice cream into the pint glass, and top off with the room temperature root beer.

name: Yummy Iced Coffee
directions: In a small bowl, stir together the water and instant coffee. In a blender, combine ice cubes, coffee mixture, milk, sweetened condensed milk and chocolate syrup. Blend until smooth. Pour into glasses and serve.

name: Carol's Creamy Mocha Protein Shake
directions: In a blender container, add the cream cheese, cream & water; blend till.
creamy.
Add the protein powder, sweetener, cold coffee, extract & blend thoroughly.
Add ice cubes one at a time until the shake is nice & thick.
Divide into 2 servings.

name: Peach Shake
directions: Empty peaches into blender, add ice cream and malted milk powder if desired, process til smooth.
Note: During the summer, you can keep a can of peaches in the frig waiting for a hot day.

similar.name: Steak and Shake Style Peach Milkshake

name: Wendy's Frosty
directions: Mix ingredients in a mug or cup and enjoy!

similar.name: Wendy's Frosty Vanilla Peanut Butter Fruity  Protein Shake

name: Caramel Iced Coffee
directions: In a blender, combine the cold coffee, whole milk, sugar, caramel and chocolate syrups, and salt.
Blend on medium speed for 20 seconds.
Add a pinch of vanilla extract and 3 cups of ice. Blend on high speed until the drink is smooth and creamy.
Serve as desired.

name: Creamsicle Milkshake
directions: In the cup of a milkshake mixer or the pitcher of a blender, combine the ice cream, sherbet, and orange juice.
Blend for 3 minutes in a milkshake mixer or 1 to 1 1/2 minutes in a blender.
The milkshake should be so thick that a straw stands up on its own in the middle of the shake.

name: Almond Banana Shake
directions: Add banana slices, almond milk, and cinnamon in a blender and blend until they reach a milk-shake-like consistency.
Pour into a glass and serve.

name: Strawberry (Or Chocolate) Banana Shake (Lite-Bleu)
directions: To a blender add strawberries (or ice cubes) and milk. Blend until ice is crushed thoroughly.
Add remaining ingredients and blend for 1 minute until smooth. Serve.

name: Banana Milkshake
directions: chop the banana into chunks and put in blender.
add 150 ml milk to the blender.
put the crushed ice cubes to the blender.
mix till ice cubes dissolve.

name: Easy Peasy Cold Buttered Rum Milkshake
directions: Combine ingredients in the container of an electric blender; cover and process until smooth, stopping once to scrape down the sides.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

name: Apple Pie a La Mode Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender until smooth.

name: Orange Julius
directions: Mix water with nonfat dry milk powder and add juice.
Blend in blender.
Add ice cubes and blend again.

name: Vanilla Thrilla Shake
directions: Place all of the ingredients in blender, except for the Reddi-wip.
Blend on high speed until well blended.
Pour into a tall glass, and finish off with whipped topping.

name: Chocolate Chip Frappuccino Creme
directions: Place all ingredients (except for the Reddi-wip) in a blender, and blend at high speed until well mixed.
Pour into a tall glass, and top with Reddi-wip!

name: Chocolate Banana High Protein Diet Shake
directions: Blend all together in blender.

name: Tasty and Cold Yogurt Shake
directions: Scoop yogurt into cup.
Pour in milk.
Mix well and Enjoy.

name: Jello Magic Milkshakes
directions: Place milk, jello, and ice cream in large pitcher with tight fitting lid; cover.
Shake vigorously one minute or until well blended.
Pour into four glasses. Serve immediately.

name: Tofu Shake That Doesn't Taste Like Tofu by Mark Mattern
directions: In a food processor or blender, puree the tofu and fruit until smooth, gradually adding the milk to loosen the mixture.
Add the maple syrup (or honey) and ice cubes (if using) and continue to blend until smooth.

similar.name: The All-Banana Shake by Deborah Madison

name: The All-Banana Shake by Deborah Madison
directions: In the blender, puree the tofu with the banana until smooth, then gradually add the milk and flavorings.
Add the ice and puree again until smooth.
Pour into glasses and scrape a little nutmeg over the top.

name: Mint Chocolate Heavenly Hello!
directions: Add ice cream and milk to blender.
Mix on medium speed until smooth.
Pour into a tall glass and top with whipped cream.
Drizzel the caramel over the whipped cream.
Enjoy, enjoy, enjoy.

name: Vanilla Milk Shake
directions: Place milk, vanilla extract, and sweetener in blender.
Process on high 30 seconds, until light and foamy.
Pour into a 12-ounce glass.
Top with ice cream.
Garnish with nutmeg.

name: Orange Blueberry Shakes
directions: In a blender, combine the first five ingredients; cover and process until smooth, stirring if necessary.
Pour into chilled glasses.
Garnish with strawberries if desired.

name: Caramel Chip Malts
directions: In a blender, combine milk, ice cream, caramel topping and chocolate malted milk powder; cover and process until blended.
Pour into chilled glasses.

name: Strawberry Banana Shake
directions: In a blender or food processor, combine all ingredients and process until smooth.
Chill and serve.

name: Peanut Butter and Banana Chocolate Milkshake
directions: In a blender container, combine milk and chocolate syrup.
Slice banana into container (avoid splashing) and drop peanut butter on top.
Cover and blend at medium speed until well-mixed and smooth.  Scrape down sides of container as necessary.
Add softened ice cream in chunks to the blender container and cover.
Blend at high speed just until smooth.
If blender is having trouble because mixture is too thick, add an additional tablespoon or so of cold milk.
Serve immediately.

name: Super Banana Shake
directions: 1.  Chop the frozen banana into small chunks.
2.  Put all ingredients in your blender and turn it on.
3.  When thoroughly blended, pour into a glass and enjoy!

name: Shake It up Baby Peach Cooler
directions: Place first 4 ingredients in blender and mix together.
Add ice cubes and blend until smooth. Pour into a tall glass.

name: Peppermint Refresher
directions: pour milk and peppermint syrup into food processor, process gently until combined.
add peppermint ice cream, process until smooth.
pour mixture into tall glasses, serve at once.

name: Ww Vanilla Shake
directions: Process everything in the blender and enjoy!

name: Iced Cappuccino'
directions: Add 1 Cup crushed ice, 2 Cups 2% Milk, 5 Tsp Sugar, 1/4 Cup Coffee Creamer to blender.
Blend for 5 Minuetes or until smooth.
Pour in drinking glass.
Add whip cream to Ice Cap, Drizzel with chocolate syrup and Enjoy!

name: Chocolate Milk Shake
directions: Blend in blender until smooth. Add ice cream slowly. Add more milk.
if too thick. Makes 2-3 servings.

name: Caribbean Milk Shake
directions: In a blender, combine ice cream and the pina colada flavored wine cooler.  Cover and blend until smooth.  Serve immediately in tall glasses.

name: Chocolate Monkey
directions: In blender container place the chocolate milk and creme de cocao.
Add banana chunks.
Cover and blend until smooth.  Through hole in lid of blender add ice cubes, one by one while blender isrunning, until mixture is smooth.
Pour into a glass.  Garnish with crushed chocoalte cookies or chopped chocolate.

name: Peachy Orange Shake
directions: Drain peaches, set aside 1 tablespoon of the juice for this recipe, then save half of the peaches & rest of the juice for some other use.
In a blender, combine the last 4 ingredients along with half of the peaches & the tablespoon of peach juice. Process until smooth.
Pour into chilled glasses & serve.

name: Lemon-Blueberry Cheesecake Shake
directions: Microwave cream cheese in a small bowl on HIGH for 30 seconds; stir until smooth.
Process cream cheese, ice cream, blueberries, and remaining ingredients in a blender until smooth; stop to scrape down sides as needed.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

name: Protein Milk Shake
directions: Follow this sequence to ensure shake does not have too much froth.
measure milk and pour into a blender.
chop banana and place in blender.
whiz blender till banana has been fully blended (approx 30 secs).
NOW ADD the (non flavoured) protein powder, and blend for just 4-5 seconds.

name: Vanilla Milkshake
directions: Put all the ingredients together and blend.
Put in nice colorful cups and serve =).

name: Cherry Joe
directions: Make the syrup:  In a small saucepan over medium heat, combine the water.
and sugar and cook until the sugar is dissolved.   Remove from the heat and
stir in the cherry flavoring, food coloring, and vodka.  Let the cherry syrup.
mixture cool completely before using.
(This makes about 2 1/2 cups syrup.
Store leftover syrup, covered, in the refrigerator for up to 6 months).

Make the shake:  In a blender:  Combine the ice cream, cherry syrup, and milk.  Blend until well combined.  Do not over blend or the shake will be too thin.  It will be very thick.  Divide between 2 glasses and serve immediately with straws.

name: Caramel Apple Shake  (Raw Food)
directions: Place all ingredients in the bowl of a blender & process until smooth.
Pour into a tall glass & ENJOY!

name: Orange Freeze
directions: Blend milk, orange juice concentrate, fat free half-and-half, powdered sugar, water, vanilla and ice cubes in a blender until smooth.  (Add additional ice cubes to get the consistency you like).
Serve immediately with an orange slice to garnish.

name: Malted Vanilla Milk Shakes
directions: Place two 12-oz. or larger glasses in the freezer to chill for about 30 minutes.
Crush the malted milk balls in a food processor or with a mortar and pestle.  Set aside.

Pour milk into blender.  Scrape in seeds from the vanilla bean; discard bean.  Cover and blend 15 seconds.  Add ice cream and malted milk powder and blend until thick and creamy, stopping to push down ice cream as necessary.
Divide milk shake between chilled glasses.  Top each with crushed malted milk balls and serve.

name: Banana Berry Milkshake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth and thick.
You may want to add a bit less milk and then thin it at the end by adding more milk if it is thicker than you prefer.

name: Banana Split Protein Shake
directions: Place water in the blender first, then powder, then additions.
Blend on low then high till well blended.

similar.name: My Great Grape and Banana Protein Shake

name: Berry Milkshake
directions: Put all the ingredients into a blender. Use the ice crush function to blend until smooth.

name: Cookies & Cream Milkshake
directions: In a blender, place the low-fat ice cream, and low-calorie chocolate cookies (aprox 30) and 1 percent milk.
Add the pure vanilla extract and blend untill most of the cookies are broken, leaving a few larger chunks.
Pour into 4 glasses and enjoy!

name: Healthy Blueberry Milkshake
directions: Place all ingredients into a blended.
Blend until smooth.
Alternatively, blend in a tall 16-17 fl oz cup using a stick blender.

name: Watermelon Papaya Batido -- Shake (Cuba -- Caribbean Islands)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender & puree until smooth.
Taste for sweetness & add sugar or lime juice as necessary.
Pour into tall glasses & serve immediately.

similar.name: Cuban  Strawberry  Banana  Milk  Shake Batido

name: Yummy Brownie Shake
directions: Pour milk, brownie batter, and ice into a blender.
Blend.
You can double the recipe if you like.
You can also vary amount of brownie batter to suit your preferences.

name: Mango Shake (Raw Food)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender & puree until smooth.
Serve & ENJOY!

name: Cinnamon Banana Shake (Raw Food)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender & puree until smooth & creamy.
Pour into 2 tall glasses & enjoy!

name: Strawberry Amaretto Ice Cream Cocktail
directions: Wash and hull the strawberries.
Put them in a blender with the ice cream, milk, powdered sugar and amaretto.
Blend until smooth. Taste and add more amaretto if desired- I like a hint of amaretto but you may prefer it stronger.
Strain through a sieve to remove the strawberry seeds (this produces a much smoother drink and is worth it if you have time).
Serve ice cold and enjoy!

name: Easy and Simple Chocolate Milk or Soymilk
directions: Mix ingredients together in blender.
Blend for 5 seconds.
Serve and enjoy.

similar.name: Low-fat Thick and Creamy Chocolate Shake

name: Frozen Cookies 'n Cream Milkshake
directions: In blender, process ice cream, ice cubes, milk and vanilla extract until thick and smooth.
Stir in Oreos and sprinkles.
Pour into 4 milkshake glasses.
If desired, garnish with whipped cream and additional sprinkles.

name: Frappuccino
directions: put ice cream in glass.
add coffee and syrup.
stir or use blender.
top with whipped topping.

name: Strawberry Banana Shake
directions: In a food processor, combine strawberries, half and half, and bananas.
Cover and process until well blended.
Add ice cream a cup at a time.  Cover and process until smooth and well blended.

name: Pb&b Shake
directions: The night before prep, peel and slice the banana, stick the pieces in a plastic baggie, and put that into the freezer. This will add a nice burst of freshness and cold to go through you.
At the time of prep, put the bananas, milk, vanilla extract, and peanut butter into the blender. It works out for the better if they go in in that order.
Blend the ingredients until the mixture is a nice beige color, or for about 30 seconds.
Serve, sip, and smile!

similar.name: Peanut Butter Banana Wake up Shake

name: Mocha Latte Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.  Process until smooth,  Serve immediately in tall glasses with straws.

name: Kittencal's Creamy Vanilla Milkshake
directions: In a blender combine all ingredients starting with 2 tablespoons sugar.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into a tall chilled glass.
Top with whipped cream and a cherry if desired.

name: Easier-Than-You-Think Strawberry Shake (A.k.a. the Mistake)
directions: Get all of the ingredients into a blender.
Blend until consistency of choice is acquired. 15 seconds suggested.
Serve, Sip, and Smile [TM].

name: Banana Nutella Protein Shake
directions: add all ingredients into a blender, then serve over ice! or add the ice to the blender
This is how I like my shake, but when I make it for my little brothers, I substitute the protein with ice cream and add more Nutella and maybe a cookie or 2 --
Enjoy.

name: Canada Day Banana Split Milkshakes
directions: Combine bananas, ice cream and milk in blender on high speed until smooth.  Set aside.

To decorate glasses, drizzle Smucker's Strawberry Sundae Syrup from top inside rim vertically, allowing the syrup to pool in the bottom of the glasses.  Continue the pattern around the rim of the glass to create a striped effect.  Pour milkshake into the center of glasses, being careful not to touch the sides.  Fill almost to the rim.  Top with whipped cream and maraschino cherry.

name: Easy Chocolate Shake (Fat-Free)
directions: In a blender, combine milk, pudding mix, and mint or rum extract, if desired.  Cover and blend until smooth.  Add ice cubes;  cover and blend until combined.  Let stand for 3 minutes to thicken slightly.

similar.name: Low-fat Thick and Creamy Chocolate Shake
Fat Free Blended Chocolate Milk " Shake"

name: Mocha Frost
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender or food processor and blend until well-mixed.
Serve in a chilled glass.  For added richness, top with whipped cream and chocolate shavings.  Garnish with a fresh mint sprig.

name: Banana Oatmeal Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and blend for 45 seconds.
pour into glass and enjoy!

name: Miami Key Lime Milkshake
directions: In a blender, combine ice cream(or yoogurt), milk, limeade concentrate, and lime peel.
Blend until mixture is smooth and frothy. Taste and add a little sugar if you need to.
Pour into 2 tall glasses. Enjoy!

similar.name: Summertime Lemonade or Limeade Milk Shake
Chocolate Milkshakes With No Ice Cream!
Cool and Creamy Banana Split Shakes

name: Jack in the Box Marshmallow Rice Krispie Shake
directions: Combine the ice cream, milk and marshmallow fluff. When you get this to the consistency you desire, gently stir in the Rice Krispies.

similar.name: Jack in the Box Oreo Cookie Shake

name: Mocca Protein Shake
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and blend well.
Enjoy!

name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Shake
directions: In a blender, combine evaporated milk, ice cream, banana, chocolate sauce and peanut butter.
Pulse to break up ingredients, then process on high speed until smooth.

name: Lemon-Buttermilk Shake
directions: In a blender, combine buttermilk and honey.  Blend for 25 seconds.
Add Ice cream and sorbet, then pulse several times to begin breaking them up.  With blender off, use a silicone spatula to mash mixture onto blades.
Continue pulsing and stoppng to mash until mixture is thick, smooth and moves easily in blender, about 1 minute.

name: Mango, Chili, and Lime Shake
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients,  Pulse several times to begin breaking up ice cream and sorbet.
With blender off, use a silicone spatula to mash ice cream and sorbet mixture onto blades.
Continue pulsing and stopping to mash until mixture is thick, smooth and moves easily in blender, about 1 minute.

name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Banana Milkshake
directions: Blend milk, banana and ice, then add peanut butter and nutella, to prevent it from sticking in the blender.
If it's too thin for you, add some peanut butter. If it's too thick, add some milk.

similar.name: Peanut Butter and Banana Chocolate Milkshake

name: Ultimate Banana Milkshake
directions: 1 Pour everything in the blender.
2 Mix in blender for 30 seconds.
3 Pour in your cup.

name: Banana Protein Shake
directions: 1. Blend together well.
2. Enjoy.

similar.name: My Great Grape and Banana Protein Shake
Chocolate Banana High Protein Diet Shake

name: Vanilla
directions: stir together and serve whith whipped cream on top.

name: Peach and Orange Milkshake
directions: Pour milk, yogurt & orange juice into a blender & process gently until combined.
Add peach slices (along with the ice, if using it) & process until smooth.
Pour into 2 tall glasses & ENJOY!

similar.name: Chocolate Milkshakes With No Ice Cream!

name: Buttermilk Shake
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender & process until smooth.
Pour into 2 tall glasses & ENJOY!

name: Raspberry Lemonade Creamsicle (Protein Drink)
directions: Mix well in blender.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Low Fat Cookie Shake
directions: Combine Fro. Yo, milk and mint extract in blended; blend till smooth.
Add cookie bits and blend 5 seonds.
Serve in frosty glasses and enjoy!

name: Light Chocolate Almond Shake
directions: Put all ingredients in blender and puree till smooth.
Serve in frosty glasses & enjoy.

name: Maple-Butter Pecan Shake
directions: Place milk, pecans, and maple syrup in a blender and blend to break down the pecans and mix thoroughly, about 30 seconds.
Add the ice cream and pulse several times to begin breaking it up. With the blender motor off, use a flexible spatula to mash the mixture down onto the blender blades.
Continue pulsing, stopping, and mashing until the mixture is well blended, thick, and moves easily in the blender jar, roughly 30 to 90 seconds.
Pour into a chilled glass or glasses, and serve at once.

name: Apple Pie Shake
directions: Place ice cubes, sweetened condensed milk, apple sauce, apple juice and cinnamon in blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.
Garnish with apple wedges if desired.
TIP:  When using the apple as a garnish use any of your favorite apples such as Granny Smith, Royal Gala, Fuji, Golden Delicious or Pink Lady.

similar.name: Apple Pie a La Mode Shake

name: Nutritious Shake
directions: Blend together.
Enjoy on the go!

name: A Sweet Chocolate Chai Milk Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Blend together and pour into glass.
Optional: Garnish with whipcream.

name: Pumpkin Spice Shake - (Protein Drink)
directions: Process in blender until smooth.
Drizzle with caramel sauce, if desired.

name: Chocolate Coconut Shake - (Protein Drink)
directions: Hand shake well.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Low-fat Thick and Creamy Chocolate Shake

name: Pumpkin Pie Milkshake
directions: Mix first 5 ingredients together in a blender.
Pour mixture into 4 glasses.
Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with some extra spice mixture.
Enjoy!

name: High Protein Chocolate Peanut Butter Shake
directions: place all ingredients in a blender, blend until smooth.
refrigerate until chilled.

similar.name: Peanut Butter and Jelly Protein Shake

name: Steak and Shake Style Peach Milkshake
directions: Combine ingriedients in a blender and blend until smooth, topping with Extra whipped cream and Maraschino Cherries.
I use The peach Syrup from Williams-Sonoma.

name: Cinnamon Roll Milkshake
directions: In a blender, mix together the ice cream, pudding, milk, and caramel. Add the cinnamon/sugar mixture (leaving a little left over). Blend until combined. Top with a dollop of cream cheese icing, sprinkle with a little cinnamon/sugar over the whole shake. Garnish with a cinnamon stick.

similar.name: Chocolate Milkshakes With No Ice Cream!

name: Nutty Bar Milkshake
directions: while still wrapped crumble the nutty bars into pieces.
scoop ice cream into  blender and milk and nutty bars.
blend until smooth.
pour into chilled glass and top with chocolate and peanut butter chips.

name: Pumpkin Milkshake
directions: Pulse all the ingredients in a blender until fully mixed. Garnish with a cinnamon stick or mint leaves.

name: Candy Apple Milkshake
directions: Put ice cream, milk and cider in blender and mix.
garnish with whipped cream and nuts.

name: Coffee Milkshakes
directions: Put the coffee, milk, vanilla syrup, and ice cream in the blender. Mix well.
Add the ice cubes. Blend until the mixture is smooth.
Pour into 4 tall glasses.

name: Toasted Marshmallow Milk Shake
directions: Place ice cream, milk, and yogurt in a blender.  Blend until well mixed and kind of sticks to the sides of the blender container.
Add 3 toasted marshmallows.  Blend again.
Pour into tall glass and top with whipped cream and remaining 2 marshmallows.

similar.name: Jack in the Box Marshmallow Rice Krispie Shake

name: Chocolate Almond Shake
directions: Blend all ingredients, Except almonds and ice cubes,
Then add nuts and cubes and blend again.

name: Ginormous Chocolate Ice Cream Shake
directions: Dissolve cocoa mix and sweetener into 2 oz. of hot water. Mix well.
Add syrup and 6 oz. of cold water and stir.
Place crushed ice and ice cream in a blender. Top with liquid mixture.
At low to medium speed, blend until shake is thoroughly mixed (but not liquified).
Pour into a very tall glass and, if desired, top with a generous squirt of Fat Free Reddi-wip and a cherry.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Sinfully Awesome Incredibly Delicious Chocolate Shake

name: Pumpkin Yogurt Cheesecake Shake
directions: Parent and Child: Wash hands.
Child: Place pumpkin, cream cheese and yogurt in a blender.
Child: Add milk, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon and nutmeg.
Parent and Child: Blend until smooth.
Parent: Pour into glasses.
Child: Top each serving with a teaspoon of graham cracker crumbs, if desired.

name: Egg Nog - Protein Shake
directions: Put all ingredients into blender and mix to desired consistency.
Serve cold.

name: Frappuccino - Protein Drink
directions: Blend thoroughly.
Enjoy!

name: Peachy Fruit and Yogurt Shake
directions: In a blender container, combine undrained peaches, banana, yogurt and vanilla.
Cover and blend till smooth.
Add ice cubes; cover and blend until frothy.
Makes 2(1 1/4 cup) servings. Enjoy!

name: Pumpkin Pie Milkshakes
directions: Place first 5 ingredients in a blender; process until smooth. Pour 3/4 cup ice cream mixture into each of 4 glasses. Top each with about 2 teaspoons whipped topping; sprinkle with the additional pumpkin-pie spice, if desired.

name: Favorite Milkshake
directions: Scoop ice cream into tall glass.
Add chocolate powder, you can tweak the amounts, I just guessed--it depends on how chocolatey you want it!

Fill the glass halfway with milk and start mushing it all around with a good strong spoon, keep on stirring and adding milk till the glass is full. This usually is a bit hard to do since the ice cream is thick, but it makes the shake nice and thick. If you like chocolate syrup you can add it as well (although I usually don't).
Enjoy the shake!

name: Chocolate Banana High Carb Drink
directions: Mix it all in a blender and enjoy! You may want to use 1 cup of frozen milk and/or frozen bananas to make the drink thicker. For more calories, add 1/4 cup of safflower oil.

name: Peanut Butter-Banana Milk Shake
directions: Combine all ingredients in a container of an electric blender; cover and process until smooth, stopping once to scrape down the sides.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Peanut Butter and Banana Sandwich Shake

name: Oatmeal Milkshake (No Ice-Cream)
directions: Add everything but Ice Cubes to Blender.
Pulse a bit to mix Oatmeal into the Milk.
Add Ice Cubes and Blend until thickened.

similar.name: Chocolate Milkshakes With No Ice Cream!

name: Chocolate Fudge Shake - Diet Saver!
directions: Make pudding according to package directions, using 2 cups of milk.  Let set about 5 minutes.
To make 1 shake, put 1/2 c prepared pudding and 1/2 c milk in blender, process for 5 seconds.

similar.name: Low-fat Thick and Creamy Chocolate Shake
Fat Free Blended Chocolate Milk " Shake"

name: Yummy Banana Shake
directions: mix all ingredents in a blender and mix well till smooth.
serve.

name: Coconut-Pineapple Batido
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and frappé until smooth.

similar.name: Cuban  Strawberry  Banana  Milk  Shake Batido

name: Saturday Sunrise Shake
directions: In blender, mix base mix together until no large chunks of banana are left.
Divide base mix into thirds.
Put 1/3 base mix back into blender with 2 strawberries - mix until smooth and no chunks of strawberry are left.
Pour into glasses.
Put 1/3 base mix back into blender with oranges - mix until smooth and no chunks are left.
Slowly pour over the back of a spoon into glass on top of strawberry mix.
Put 1/3 base mix back into blender with pineapple - mix until smooth and little to no chunks are left.
Slowly pour over the back of a spoon into glass on top of orange mix.
Sprinkle top with granola.

name: Mad Dash Monday Shake
directions: Add all ingredients except granola into blender.
Mix until berries & banana are smooth.
Pour into cup that won't tip over in the car.
Top with granola (optional).
Race off to whatever the day has ahead.

name: Spiced Sunday Shake
directions: Cut the apple into 1/2 inch pieces.
Add all ingredients in order (except granola) into blender.
Mix until apple & banana are smooth (no chunks of apple floating around.).
Pour into 2 glasses and top with granola.

name: Cocoa Chocolate Shake
directions: Place water, cocoa and sugar in blender container. Cover; blend briefly on low speed. Add milk.
Cover; blend on high speed until thoroughly blended. Add ice cream. Cover; blend until smooth. Serve immediately.

name: Maple Pecan Protein Shake
directions: Soak dates in one cup of water for about two hours.
Put soaking water with the dates and pecans in food processor and process until smooth. That may take 2 to 5 minutes.
As soon as the nutmilk is smooth, add maple syrup, whey protein and egg. Continue processing until everything is smooth and creamy.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Butterscotch Pecan Liquid Pie Protein Shake

name: Creamsicle Float (Or Any Other Flavor!)
directions: In a chilled glass or freezie mug, add the ice cream and sherbet.  SLOWLY pour on the soda, add a straw and an ice tea spoon and enjoy.

name: Mocha Caramel Kahlua Milkshake
directions: Combine the milk, espresso powder, chocolate syrup, caramel sauce, and Kahlua in a blender and blend until combined, about 5 seconds. Add the ice cream and blend until smooth, about 10 seconds. Serve immediately, garnished with the whipped cream and chocolate-covered espresso beans and a drizzle of caramel sauce, if desired.

name: Cherry Chocolate Frosty
directions: Combine all 3 ingredients in a blender & process for 30 seconds or until smooth.
Pour into a glass & enjoy!

name: Healthier Frappuccino
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and blend on HIGH until frothy and ice is smoothly crushed.
Note: roma is a coffee substitute made from roasted barley. You can also  use Kaffix in its place.
Edit the ingredients to suit your taste!

name: Espresso Eggnog Shake
directions: In a blender container, combine espresso, syrup, eggnog and ice cream.
Blend until smooth and pour into a tall serving glass.

similar.name: Jack in the Box's Egg Nog Milk Shake

name: Strawberry Lime Shake
directions: Place all ingredients in a Vita-Mix and puree on high speed until smooth.
Serve.

name: Peanut Butter Banana Wake up Shake
directions: In blender combine the yogurt, milk, peanut butter, honey and banana.
Blend until smooth.
With blender running, carefully add ice cubes.
Blend until thickened and smooth.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Peanut Butter and Banana Sandwich Shake

name: Chocolate Avocodo Shake
directions: Put ice, milk of choice, avocado, cocoa, and sweetened condensed milk (or honey) and espresso into a blender and blend until smooth, about 30 seconds.  Serve.

name: Extra Lean and Easy Protein Shake
directions: mix all and blend in a blender.

name: Cinnamon Banana Shake
directions: In a blender combine the ice cream, milk, bananas. and cinnamon. Scrape the seeds from the vanilla bean with the back of a knife and add to the ice cream mixture. Blend on high speed until smooth & frothy.

name: Vanilla Milkshake
directions: first mix in the ice cream and milk with the vanilla.
then add in the cream and ice.
pour out into two cups and enjoy!

name: On a Diet Creamy Oreo Milkshake (3 Ww Points)
directions: Put the first three ingredients in a blender and let the creamer dissolve. Add Splenda, protein powder, ice cream and ice cubes and blend until drink is smooth and creamy; add more ice cubes as needed to get the desired consistency. Add the Oreo Thin Crisps and pulse only until blended -- if you pulse too much the Oreos will get pulverized.

name: Caramel Latte Milkshake
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth and thick.
Top with whipped cream and a swirl of caramel syrup on top.

name: Triple Fruit Yogurt Shake
directions: In blender combine yogurt, strawberries, kiwi, banana, chopped mint (if using) and honey. Puree to a smooth consistency.
Divide between two 8oz glasses and garnish, if desired, with mint sprigs.

name: Double Chocolate, Chocolate Shake
directions: Get out your blender and all needed ingredients.
First add milk. Then continue with ice, chocolate ice cream, and chocolate syrup.
Now blend. First start off by grinding the ice, then puree, and finally blend. Continue blending until milk shake is completely mixed.
Pour in cup or glass.
Optional: If you wish, you can add a topping of whipped cream, and a single seedless cherry.
Enjoy!

name: Coconut-Orange Delight Shake
directions: Process all ingredients in a blender until desired consistency, stopping to scrape down the sides.
Serve immediately.

name: Bailey's Dream Shake
directions: Incorporate ingredients and blend until smooth.

similar.name: Peanut Butter, Banana and Baileys Cheesecake Milk Shake

name: Chocolate Strawberry Milkshake
directions: just blend them all together and there you have it.

name: Dulce De Leche Coffee Shake
directions: Process the first 3 ingredients (and, if desired, the coffee liqueur) in a blender, stopping to scrape down the sides.
Serve immediately.
Recommended to use Haagen-Daz brand ice cream.

similar.name: Coffee and Dulce De Leche Shakes

name: Peachy Mint Shake
directions: In a small saucepan, bring the orange juice(or water or peach juice) and the mint leaves to a boil.
Turn off the heat, cover, and let the mint leaves steep for 5 minutes.
Let the mint mixture cool to room temperature.
Place the mint water (including leaves-optional) peaches, ice cream and 1 cup of ice cubes in a blender and puree until smooth.
Serve immediately in chilled glasses and garnish with a slice of peach and a sprig of mint.
Enjoy!

name: Strawberries and Cream Coffee
directions: Pour the hot coffee into a blender.
Add the strawberries, jam, and ice cream and blend together.
With the blender motor running at the highest speed, drop in the ice cubes, one at a time, and mix until mixture is very cold and frothy.
Pour into one large or two medium-sized glasses and serve immediately.

name: Cheesecake Milkshake
directions: Combine milk, cheesecake, vanilla, 1 pint of ice cream in a blender and puree until thick and smooth.
If the mixture is too thin add more ice cream a little bit at a time and blend.
This milkshake should be thick enough to eat with a spoon if you like.
Pour into two glasses.

name: Strawberry Milk Shakes
directions: To make syrup: In a saucepan bring all syrup ingredients except for the lemon juice to a boil over medium high heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Boil for 10 minutes. Stir in lemon juice. Stain syrup. Cover and chill. Can be made one week ahead -- keep chilled. Makes 2 1/2 cups but you only need 1 cup for the milk shakes -- use remainder for another day.
To make milk shakes -- place 4 tall glasses in freezer for one hour.
In a blender place 1 cup of the srawberry syrup, milk and 1 pint of the ice cream and puree until smooth. Add second pint of ice cream and puree until smooth.
Divide mixture among the 4 glasses.
Drizzle each glass with some more syrup and top with a strawberry.
Serve with spoon and/or straw.

name: Salted Caramel Vanilla Latte Milkshake
directions: For the salted caramel sauce:

In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, combine the sugar and water over medium-low heat until the sugar dissolves. Increase the heat and bring to a boil, without stirring. If necessary, use a wet pastry brush to wash down any crystals on the side of the pan. Boil until the syrup is a deep amber color, about 5 to 6 minutes.

Remove the sugar from the heat and carefully whisk in the heavy cream. The mixture will bubble. Stir in the unsalted butter and salt. Transfer the caramel to a dish and cool.  Keeps refrigerated for for 2 weeks.
For the salted caramel milkshake:
Combine the ice cream, milk and caramel sauce in a blender and blend until smooth.

name: Peach Snickerdoodle Milk Shakes
directions: Mix 2 tablespoons sugar and 2 teaspoons ground cinnamon in small bowl. Set aside. Cook peach wedges, lemon juice, remaining 2 tablesppons sugar, and pinch of ground cinnamon in heavy large skillet over medium-low heat until peaches are soft and begin to fall apart, stirring often, about 5 minutes. Remove form heat and cool peach compote completely. (Peach compote can be make 4 hours ahead. Cinnamon sugar can be covered and stored at room temperature. Refrigerate and cover compote.).

Puree 2 cups vanilla ice cream, 1/3 cup crumbled snickerdoodle cookies, half of cinnamon sugar, and half of peach compote in blender until smooth. Divide milk shake between 2 tall glasses. Repeat with remaining ingredients. Sprinkle additional crumbled snickerdoodle cooies over milk shakes and serve.

name: Bananas Foster Milkshake
directions: For the bananas Melt the butter in a medium nonstick skillet over medium heat and heat until it stops foaming. Add the bananas and brown sugar, stir to help melt the sugar and coat the bananas, and cook, stirring occasionally, until the bananas are soft and saucy, about 2 minutes.
Add 3 tablespoons (1 1/2 ounces) of the rum, allow it to warm for a few seconds, and carefully wave a lit chimney match over the pan until the rum ignites.
Allow the rum to burn until it extinguishes, about 30 seconds. Off the heat, add the cinnamon, stir to combine, and allow the mixture to cool to room temperature, about 20 minutes.

For the shake Place the bananas, sauce, milk, and remaining 1 tablespoon (1/2 ounce) of rum in a blender and blend to mix thoroughly, about 30 seconds. Add the ice cream and pulse several times to begin breaking it up.

With the blender motor off, use a flexible spatula to mash the mixture down onto the blender blades. Continue pulsing, stopping, and mashing until the mixture is well blended, thick, and moves easily in the blender jar, roughly 30 to 90 seconds. Pour into a chilled glass or glasses and serve at once.
